title: Loading time is too long
excerpt:
Hey there, 
During this time of confinement me & my team are not using Monday.com anymore because… we are in remote places with weak wi-fi and Monday.Com takes ages to load (desktop and web server). Anything you could do…

posts.author: Arnaud (Arnaud Prigent)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

During this time of confinement me & my team are not using Monday.com anymore because… we are in remote places with weak wi-fi and Monday.Com takes ages to load (desktop and web server). Anything you could do ?

Thanks for your support

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Arnaud how are you.
Where are you from and whats your speed connection?
You have problems with loading time in all monday features or some ?

posts.author: Arnaud (Arnaud Prigent)
posts.cookedHtml:
helIo @hlopezvc
I am in France
My speed connection is poor (2Mbps)
Loading time is terrible in all Monday (especially the desktop version)

posts.author: Redleaf (Aaron)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes extremely unproductive, I may have to leave the ecosystem as it is sooo slow. Please fix!!!
